case_title: DARLENE GUTIERREZ VS. OSCAR I. OBANDO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, DARLENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OBANDO, OSCAR I. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 31 BRANNAM PLACE (SECOND BEDROOM TO THE LEFT), SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE [$25.00 PER DAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, DARLENE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT OBANDO, OSCAR I.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT OBANDO, OSCAR I.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, DARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT OBANDO, OSCAR I.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, DARLENE SERVED APR-24-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OBANDO, OSCAR I.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, DARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT OBANDO, OSCAR I. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OBANDO, OSCAR I.
